case_title: WILLIAMS, LINDA (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) et al VS DEWOLF REALTY

docket_entries.description: AD LITEM PETIITON ORDER SIGNED BY COMM. LYONS.
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, LINDA (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) WILLIAMS, LARENDA BYRD, ROBERT SEAN (MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,346.00, DEFENDANT STEVEN RING DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
